title: Default Double Plus
description: A mod package of mods and resourcepacks that enchances the gameplay of Vanilla Minecraft while keeping it feeling the same.
body:
Ever felt like Vanilla Minecraft needed a little spice up to enhance its experience?
 
![PLUS THE EXPERIENCE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a92ee71d984ab71701a1d9476dfe021feb50d819_0.webp)

This mod package contains 65 mods, 21 Resource packs and 1 Shader to Enchance your experience to play Vanilla minecraft without changing it drastically to become a overhaul mod.

### Examples of what the package contains are:
- [AutoSwitch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-autoswitch)
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns)
- [Friends & Foes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/friends-and-foes)

![DOUBLE THE VANILLA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f77de077d933f66a53651ab6afd1c73d6974d8eb_0.webp)

![CRAFTING](https://i.imgur.com/dzM7sJO.gif)

![CREDITS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfe361ce6f63fd581f8a9405b0598d42a0657a6e_0.webp)
